title: Integrating Real Estate Tools with monday.com (Featuring Buildium + LaunchEngine)

posts.author: Sammy (Samantha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey monday community!

If you’re a monday.com consultant, superuser, or just love seeing how deep monday can go across industries—this one’s for you.

Join us for our next Tuesdays with monday session, where we’ll dive into real estate tech integrations, with a spotlight on Buildium—a popular property management tool—and how it’s being seamlessly integrated with monday.com using LaunchEngine.

What you’ll learn:

  • Real-world use case of monday.com + Buildium
  • How LaunchEngine supports real estate clients in bridging the two platforms
  • Pro tips and common integration questions
  • Bonus tips from the integration experts themselves

When: Tuesday, August 5 at 12:00 PM EST
Hosted by Purple Plum Consulting with special guests from LaunchEngine

Whether you serve real estate clients or are curious about industry-specific use cases for monday.com, this is a great opportunity to expand your toolkit.

Register here or drop your question below in advance.

Let’s keep building better with monday

posts.author: allison_purple (Allison Prell)
posts.cookedHtml: Can’t wait for this! Already in my calendar.
